case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS JONES, ERIC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,132.50 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, ERIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, ERIC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, ERIC $2,132.50 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,158.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT JONES, ERIC HEARING SET FOR MAY-01-2002 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAY-01-2002, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, ERIC PLAINTIFF STIPULATES TO VACATING THE JUDGMENT. DISMISSAL IS AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, ERIC
